allow: Bash(node -e "const s3 = require\(''@aws-sdk/client-s3''\); const keys = Object.keys\(s3\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''encrypt''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''tag''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''notfound''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''nosuch''\)\); console.log\(keys\)")
